name: @aflo/credit-data
description: Provider-neutral credit-data interfaces (credit-data.v1.0.0): a normalized AFLO credit model, a bureau-agnostic provider adapter, deterministic normalization into readiness-relevant facts, and a synthetic MOCK provider. No production bureau is wired — real providers plug in only behind a reviewed contract and compliance review (ADR-0007 §5, PARTNER_ORCHESTRATION_ROADMAP.md).
